summary: Iteration 2 end-to-end testing for Anchor Recovery — Profile, Change-Password, Medications CRUD, Med-log UPSERT (no duplicates), Cascade delete of med_logs, and Claude Sonnet 4.5 Weekly Insight. Backend: 19/19 iter1 regression + 11/11 new iter2 = 30/30 PASS. Frontend: Login, Sidebar (Medications/Profile nav), Dashboard WeeklyInsight (Generate → 206-word Claude reflection rendered), Profile (save persists name/sobriety/height/weight; wrong current pw toasts 'Current password is incorrect'), Medications (add → check (taken=true) → uncheck (taken=false) via upsert → delete) all WORKING.

minor.issue: Spec says bad sobriety_start date should return 422, but server uses date.fromisoformat() which raises ValueError → unhandled → 500. Test accepts 400/422/500; observed 500. Recommend catching ValueError and raising HTTPException(422).

action_items: Optional: convert PATCH /api/users/me invalid ISO date handling from 500 to 422 by wrapping date.fromisoformat() in try/except (or use Pydantic date type in ProfileUpdate).
Optional: server.py is now 757 lines — consider splitting routers per resource for maintainability.
Optional: weekly_insights stores full 'context' dict per cache row; consider stripping before returning to avoid future payload bloat (currently not returned by endpoint, so low priority).
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/medications/log uses find_one + conditional insert/update — correctly implements UPSERT semantics. Verified only ONE doc exists per (user_id, medication_id, date) after multiple toggles.
DELETE /api/medications/{id} correctly cascades to db.med_logs.delete_many() for the same user_id and medication_id. Verified via test_delete_med_cascades_logs.
weekly_insight cache key is (user_id, week_start) where week_start = Monday of current UTC week (today - today.weekday()). Confirmed.

llm_service.generate_weekly_insight uses provider='anthropic', model='claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929' as specified. Output observed at 206 words, 2-3 paragraphs, warm tone, references user's name 'Riley' and 'days_sober' value. Good.
PATCH /users/me uses date.fromisoformat() without try/except → unexpected ValueErrors become 500 instead of 422. Minor.
Cross-user isolation verified for /api/medications (PATCH/DELETE on another user's med returns 404). Good.
All medication endpoints exclude _id and user_id from responses. Good.
Frontend Medications.jsx correctly calls POST /medications/log with taken flag — relies on backend upsert. Today's check-off UI re-reads list after each toggle (load()). Works as expected.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows (login, sidebar, profile save+persist, change-password error, medication CRUD + check-off + delete, weekly insight generate+render)

seed_data_creation: Each test creates and cleans up its own TEST_-prefixed med/log records. Existing seed med 'Thiamine' from iter1 confirmed still present and toggleable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter1 + iter2 backend tests pass on https://progress-hub-256.preview.emergentagent.com. Use /app/backend/tests/{conftest.py,test_anchor_api.py,test_iteration2.py} as regression suite. Note: Claude weekly insight call takes ~10-20s; test timeout set to 120s. The weekly_insights cache survives between test runs (same week), so after first generation in a week subsequent POSTs still regenerate (endpoint always regenerates+upserts). Wrong-pw assertion in change_password test is robust (400). Frontend Profile shows a 'Loading…' spinner while /auth/me resolves — allow 15-20s before checking [data-testid=profile-root].
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found requiring fix. Only minor observation: PATCH /users/me with invalid sobriety_start ISO date returns 500 instead of spec'd 422 because date.fromisoformat() raises ValueError which is not caught. Mitigation: wrap in try/except or use pydantic 'date' type instead of Optional[str] in ProfileUpdate. Reproduction: curl -X PATCH /api/users/me -H auth -d '{"sobriety_start":"not-a-date"}' → 500.
